Feedback
Partnerblazer Community

Agentforce Marketing

Gain hands-on experience with this next-generation platform through self-guided, practical workshops.

Setup Demo Org

Begin your learning journey by configuring a Simple Demo Org (SDO) to follow this guided workshop series.

Branding Content

Establish your brand’s colors, typography, and visual styles to ensure a consistent look and feel across all marketing assets.

Campaign Creation

Use Agentforce to instantly generate campaign briefs and message components—reducing planning time and effort.

Data Graphs

Bring together structured DMO data into unified, reusable views that drive personalization and targeting across multi-channel campaigns.

Dynamic Content

Build personalized experiences with dynamic elements and targeting rules, then tailor each content variation to your audience.

Scoring Models

Assign scores to individuals based on their engagement with your marketing content and how closely they fit your ideal customer.

Repeaters in Emails

Include dynamic content blocks that display multiple records of products, events, or promotions in a single email.
column3: Landing Pages"><h3 class="vp-feature-title"><iconify-icon class="vp-icon" icon="intermediate" sizing="height" height="1em"></iconify-icon><span>Forms &amp
column4:
Landing Pages
Capture contact information from a form on a landing page and customize a flow to create a new CRM record in real-time.

External Forms

Create a low-code solution that captures form data from an external website and creates records in Salesforce CRM using flow.

Website Tracking

Track website visitor behavior on an external website and configure a custom consent banner to capture consent for data collection.

Record-Triggered Emails

Invoke a record-triggered flow that assigns variables to an Apex class and sends a personalized email when a new CRM record is created.

API Triggered Flows

Use API calls to trigger on-demand flows from external websites or third-party platforms to automate business processes.

Consent Management

Learn the fundamentals of how consent is managed in Marketing Cloud and the different methods for capturing and managing consent.

Email Recommendations

Include a curated series of personalized recommendations in emails, powered by a Salesforce Personalization recommender.

Setup Intelligence

Learn how to set up Marketing Intelligence to connect, harmonize, and transform third-party marketing data into actionable insights.

Setup Personalization

Define the appropriate app settings and permissions to create personalized experiences with Salesforce Personalization.

Web Sitemap

Create a web sitemap using the low-code Sitemap Builder browser extension to define what should be tracked on your website.

Web Schemas

Upload a website sitemap and schema file to capture and ingest structured website interaction events into Data 360.

Data Streams

Deploy a website connector and map the associated web data streams in a Data 360 data space.

Identity Resolution

Create an identity resolution ruleset in Data 360 that powers a real-time profile data graph.

Item Data Graphs

Create a data graph to power rules-based and objective-based recommenders for cross-channel personalization.

Profile Data Graphs

Create a real-time data graph that returns in-the-moment profile data for real-time personalization and decisioning.

Recommenders

Create rules-based and ML powered objective-based recommenders to return 1:1 recommendations in real-time.

Response Templates

Configure a response template that defines the configuration options available to marketers when they’re building a personalization decision.

Personalization Points

Bring together recommenders, response templates, and targeting logic to deliver personalization across channels.

Experience Templates

Create channel-specific experience templates to control how personalization decisions are rendered.

Personalization Experiences

Use Web Personalization Manager to set up personalization points that enable dynamic, data-driven experiences across your website.

Personalization Attribution

Configure custom attribution models to track personalization point performance and build an attribution model funnel.
